name: getly-headless-sdk
description: Getly Open API & Vibe-Coder SDK — run a digital-products store entirely through your AI assistant

scripts.build: npm run build -w @getly/sdk --if-present && npm run build --workspaces --if-present
scripts.test: npm run build -w @getly/sdk && npm run test --workspaces --if-present
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @getly/sdk && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
